rows.label: qev075503_MSG0001
rows.name:
Sorry for making you come
all the way out here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0002
rows.name:
I've been training endlessly, and
I've finally become able to use
Grandpa's ultimate technique, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0003
rows.name:
It seems it just gets messed
up in narrow spaces, and it's
incredibly hard to perform![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hehe... Are you ready? This
time around, I'm completely
different from before, you hear?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_SEL0011
rows.name: Draw your weapon, stating you are ready.

rows.label: qev075503_SEL0021
rows.name:
Leave the area, stating you
need to prepare once more.

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0005
rows.name:
The ultimate technique that defeated
every fierce warrior who came to
that place—I'll show it to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hurry up...! I'm on the
verge of exploding here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0008
rows.name:
My name is Gi Zang, the last survivor
of the Hundred Hellions! Now, I draw
the sword entrusted to me by my ma[ST:wide ][ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Wait, I left Grandpa's
sword with you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0010
rows.name:
Heh! Today is the day I get that
sword back! I will surpass you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0011
rows.name:
My name is Gi Zang, the last survivor
of the Hundred Hellions! Now, I draw the
sword entrusted to me by my master![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0012
rows.name:
The results of all the training I've
done with you on this planet so far...
I'll show you every bit of it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0013
rows.name:
Uwoooooooooooooooooh!! Be unleashed, my
body! Burn, my soul! Hundred Hellions
Ultimate Technique: Sanshin Gōshinkō...!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075503_MSG0014
rows.name:
These guys... they're all me! Let's
see if you can completely dodge a
three-hit combo at lightspeed![ST:wait ]
